name: Woo Woo
recipeIngredient: 1 can frozen grape juice (do not dilute)
1 can frozen cranberry/raspberry juice (do not dilute)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 3 boxes of jello and 2 cups boiling water in a large pot. Stir until the jello dissolves completely.
2. Pour the mixture into a large bowl.
3. Add the remaining ingredients to the bowl and stir until well combined.
4. Divide the mixture evenly among 2-ounce cups or pour it into a large pan if making shooters.
5. Chill the mixture in the refrigerator for several hours, or until set.
6. If using a large pan, cut the jello into smaller portions before serving.
7. Each batch makes approximately 72 servings of 2-ounce jello cups.
Note: Be cautious when consuming these drinks due to their potency.
